name: Stroganoff Meatballs Over Egg Noodles
recipeIngredient: 1 large package of wide egg noodles (16 oz bag)
2 cans Cream of Mushroom soup, undiluted
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine hamburger, oats, egg, ketchup, onion flakes, and salt in a bowl.
2. Shape the mixture into meatballs.
3. Bake the meatballs in two greased 9x13-inch pans (or one larger pan) for 12-15 minutes at 450°F.
4. Meanwhile, boil the noodles until cooked through.
5. In a separate pot, combine the soup, milk, sour cream, and Seasoned Salt. Heat through.
6. Add the meatballs to the sauce, draining slightly on a paper towel.
7. Toss the meatballs in the sauce to coat them evenly.
8. Drain the noodles and toss with margarine and parsley.
9. Serve the meatballs and sauce over the egg noodles.
